connectDesc: Connect the sponsor wallet to access winning solutions.
title: Winning Solutions
securityNote: These solutions are delivered over an encrypted connection and decrypted only for your authenticated session. They are not stored in your browser. Download or copy what you need.
accessDesc: Sign a message with your wallet to prove you are the bounty sponsor. Only the sponsoring wallet can access solutions.
accessNote: This requires a wallet signature — no gas, no transaction, just proof of ownership.
